message.content:
@startuml
title TCPClient::connectToServer(string ipAddress, int port)

participant "UC1" as UC1
participant "TCPClient" as TCP
participant "clientStructure" as CS

UC1 -> TCP : connectToServer(ipAddress, port)

note right of TCP : create a socket

TCP -> TCP : socket_ = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);

opt [socket_ == -1]
  TCP --> UC1 : return -1 (socket create faild)
end

note right of CS : objeckt of\nsockaddr_in

TCP -> CS : clientStructure()

TCP -> TCP : clientStructure.sin_family = AF_INET;

TCP -> TCP : clientStructure.sin_port = htons(port);

note right of TCP : linking ipAddress to clientstructure\nusing AF_INET standart

TCP -> TCP : inet_pton(AF_INET, ipAddress.c_str(),\n&clientStructure.sin_addr);

TCP -> TCP : connectRes = connect(socket_, (sockaddr*)&clientStructure,\nsizeof(clientStructure));

opt [connectRes == -1]
  TCP --> UC1 : return -1 (faild to connect)
end

destroy CS

TCP --> UC1 : return 0 (connected)

@enduml
